# Flower Adult Family Home LLC

> Compassionate 24/7 adult family home care in Everett, WA

## About
Flower Adult Family Home LLC is a licensed residential care facility located at 605 74th St SW, Everett, WA 98203. We provide personalized, family-style care for up to 6 residents in a warm, home-like environment. Licensed by Washington State DSHS under license #758860.

## Services
- 24/7 Attentive Care: Round-the-clock supervision and assistance
- Medication Management: Professional medication administration and monitoring
- Personal Hygiene Care: Bathing, grooming, and dressing assistance
- Nutritious Meals: Home-cooked meals tailored to dietary needs
- Memory and Dementia Care: Specialized support for Alzheimer's and dementia
- Mobility and Rehab Support: Physical assistance and rehabilitation coordination

## Contact
- Phone: (206) 504-0037 or (206) 313-1516
- Email: abeba@flowerafh.com
- Address: 605 74th St SW, Everett, WA 98203
- Available: 24/7

## Service Area
Everett, WA and surrounding Snohomish County communities including Marysville, Lake Stevens, Mukilteo, Lynnwood, and Edmonds.
